message:
perf(core): skip active_txn RefCell borrow on microbatch-carry UPDATE/DELETE

bd-ifgl7 W5-4: When the statement microbatch carry confirms we're inside
an explicit transaction, bypass the active_txn.borrow().is_some() RefCell
heap-touch in both the direct-simple and fused-entry fast lanes of
execute_precompiled_prepared_update_or_delete. Adds
microbatch_carry_verified_in_txn flag to PreparedDmlEntryProof — set true
only when the carry matched in_explicit_txn + concurrent_session_id.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
